g.text: 31-22 | PD Index | 10 bits | Page Directory entry
21-12 | PT Index | 10 bits | Page Table entry
Each PDE | Covers 4 MB | 1024 pages × 4 KB
Sparse | Only allocate PDEs for used regions
Each PTE | Covers 4 KB | One page
Per PT | 1024 PTEs | 4 MB of VA space
On-demand| Allocated when region first accessed
Two-Level PT | 1,024 × 4B per table | 4 KB each
Sparse (3 reg)| 4 KB + 3×4 KB | 16 KB total
